html:
Exclusive to:

An Armored Boat is a type of craftable Boat in the Shipwrecked DLC. It can be found in the Nautical Tab and requires an Alchemy Engine and 6 Boards, 3 Rope, and 10 Seashells to craft. It begins with 500 durability, which will deplete if damaged or as it is used. It can be repaired with the Boat Repair Kit or the Sea Yard. While moving, it loses Durability at a rate of 1 per 3.84 seconds, lasting a total of 4 Days.

The Armored Boat has 2 seconds of “hit immunity”, a period of time in which they will not trigger the hit state after being hit. This is the best out of all Boats. It is also tied with the Cargo Boat and Encrusted Boat for the best map reveal range of 2.5.

The Armored Boat is one of the boats with equipment slots, allowing the player to equip Sails, Boat Lanterns, Boat Cannons and Trawl Nets.

Tips

  • Destroying an Armored Boat with a Hammer yields 3 Boards, 2 Rope, and 5 Seashells regardless of its durability. Since Seashells are very common and easier to collect than Stingers, it can be more practical to craft a new Armored Boat rather than use Boat Repair Kits to repair heavy damage. Having a boat pre-crafted and ready to deploy as needed allows for even more flexibility.

Gallery

  • Woodlegs on an Armored Boat at night, as seen in the Shipwrecked trailer.
  • An Armored Boat in game.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

–Wheeler

It begins with 500 durability, which will deplete if damaged or as it is used. It can be repaired with the Boat Repair Kit or the Sea Yard. The Armored Boat is one of the boats with equipment slots, allowing the player to equip Sails, Boat Lanterns, Boat Cannons and Trawl Nets.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thuyền Thiết Giáp là một loại Thuyền có thể chế tạo được trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Nó có thể được tìm thấy trong Thẻ Hàng Hải và yêu cầu Máy Luyện Kim và 6 Ván Ép, 3 Dây Thừng và 10 Vỏ Sò để chế tạo. Nó bắt đầu với độ bền 500, độ bền này sẽ cạn kiệt nếu bị hư hỏng hoặc khi được sử dụng. Nó có thể được sửa chữa bằng Bộ Sửa Thuyền hoặc Sân Biển. Khi di chuyển, nó mất Độ bền với tốc độ 1 trên 3,84 giây, kéo dài tổng cộng 4 Ngày.

An '''Armored Boat''' is a type of craftable [[Boats|Boat]] in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It can be found in the [[Nautical Tab]] and requires an [[Alchemy Engine|Alchemy]] Engine and 6 [[Boards]], 3 [[Rope]], and 10 [[Seashell]]s to craft. It begins with 500 durability, which will deplete if damaged or as it is used. It can be repaired with the [[Boat Repair Kit]] or the [[Sea Yard]]. While moving, it loses [[Durability]] at a rate of 1 per 3.84 seconds, lasting a total of 4 [[Day]]s.

The Armored Boat has 2 seconds of [https://store.steampowered.com/news/app/219740/view/2919977626398219425 “hit immunity”], a period of time in which they will not trigger the hit state after being hit. This is the best out of all [[Boats]]. It is also tied with the [[Cargo Boat]] and [[Encrusted Boat]] for the best map reveal range of 2.5.

The Armored Boat is one of the boats with equipment slots, allowing the player to equip [[Sail]]s, [[Boat Lantern]]s, [[Boat Cannon]]s and [[Trawl Net]]s.

== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* Destroying an Armored Boat with a [[Hammer]] yields 3 Boards, 2 Rope, and 5 Seashells regardless of its durability. Since Seashells are very common and easier to collect than Stingers, it can be more practical to craft a new Armored Boat rather than use Boat Repair Kits to repair heavy damage. Having a boat pre-crafted and ready to deploy as needed allows for even more flexibility.
